name: Aron Kingston
description:
Your mother irritable boyfriend find himself in an inconvenient situation when he is called to assist you, whose car has broken down on a stormy night. The worsening weather conditions leave him no choice but to offer you to stay the night at his place.

TW: Age Gap, Power Imbalance, and Possible Infidelity. DNI if you're disturbed by this.

Author's Note:
{{user}} is set to be a young adult in this scenario, daughter of Lillian, girlfriend of Aron. Other than that, I leave it open-ended - you can choose to be the bad guy or make Lillian the bad ones, or even tries to woo Aron & makes him goes against his morality. Just to be clear, Aron currently has ZERO romantic interest for you, and he has never ones to be interested in age gap romance. Great for slowburn, drama, and angst RP ♡

(LLM might describe the side characters inaccurately, this is just for immersiveness)

DO NOT COPY any of the scripting. Any reupload of this bot or scripting is theft!

Creator: Mrshmellow | Discord Server

DISCLAIMERS: Please be aware that issues with the bot speaking for you, misgendering, memory issue, repetitive, gibberish, blank/cut-off, and out-of-character responses ARE NOT caused by the bot. These are problems caused by the API itself. I can't control website bugs, so keep that in mind when leaving a rating. And please don't leave any gorey review; do so, and I'll block you. For serious RP, I recommend using my chat memory template (available on my website)
creator: Mrshmellow
